title: 🎒 Inventory Guide (Storage + Pockets)
footer: Veyra • Inventory management is a skill issue • Tip: Sell or trade extras

pages.title: 🎒 Inventory Overview
pages.description:
Your **Inventory** is where all your items live.

If you hoard items like a dragon: ✅ Inventory.
If you're broke but still collecting junk: also ✅ Inventory.

Inventory items are shown with:
• item name
• quantity (`X amount`)
• rarity
• description

fields.name: Core Commands
fields.value:
• `/check inventory [category]` - view your inventory
• `!info <item>` - detailed item info
• `/transfer_item <user> <item> <amount>` - give items to someone
• `/find_item <item_name>` - find where an item can be obtained (costs 25G)
• `!use <item>` - use an item (only works if usable)

Examples:
`/check inventory`
`!info copper ore`
`/transfer_item @user wooden box 2`
`/find_item silver ore`
`!use bread`

fields.name: Quick Reminder
fields.value:
Items can be **traded**, **sold**, or sometimes **used**.
Some items (like loot boxes) are *not usable* with `!use`. They are opened via `!open`

pages.title: 🔍 Item Info (What is this thing?)
pages.description:
`!info` gives detailed information about an item.
This is what you use when you're staring at an item name like it's ancient scripture.

fields.name: What it shows
fields.value:
• item name
• description
• rarity color
• icon (if the item has one)
• how many you own

fields.name: Typos & Suggestions
fields.value:
If you type the wrong item name, Veyra tries to suggest the closest match.

If your spelling is beyond saving, you'll get:
"Idk about anything like that."

pages.title: 🎁 Giving Items (Transfer System)
pages.description:
You can transfer items to other players (or even to Veyra).

Because sometimes generosity is cool.
And sometimes you're just clearing junk.

fields.name: Rules
fields.value:
✅ Target must be a registered player
❌ You can't transfer to yourself
✅ If the target is Veyra, special logic applies

fields.name: Veyra Transfers (Special)
fields.value:
If you transfer items to Veyra:
• items are taken from you and given to her
• you gain **friendship** with Veyra

So yes, you can bribe her. Nice.

fields.name: Common Errors
fields.value:
• mistyped item → suggestions
• target not registered → can't interact
• receiver full → transfer fails

pages.title: 🧪 Using Items (Use vs Open)
pages.description: `!use` is only for items that are actually *usable*.

fields.name: Loot Boxes
fields.value:
Lootboxes cannot be used.
These include:
• Wooden Box
• Stone Box
• Iron Box
• Platinum Box

Instead use:
`!open wooden box`

fields.name: If you don’t own it
fields.value:
If you try using an item you don’t have, Veyra will block you.
Example:
"You don't have any <item>. Can't use!"

pages.title: 👝 Pockets vs 🎒 Inventory (Super Important)
pages.description:
Veyra storage has **two upgrade paths** and they do *different* things:

🎒 **Inventory = how many slots you own**
👝 **Pockets = how much each slot can hold**

So:
• Inventory decides **how many different stacks you can store**
• Pockets decides **how big each stack can be**

Upgrade both if you don’t want to live the painful "Inventory Full" lifestyle.

fields.name: 🎒 Inventory (Slot Count)
fields.value:
Inventory upgrades increase your **total slots**.

Each slot holds **one stack** of an item.
More slots = more different item stacks you can keep.

Example:
If you have **30 slots**, you can hold up to **30 stacks** (not 30 items).

fields.name: 👝 Pockets (Stack Size per Slot)
fields.value:
Pockets upgrades increase **stack size limits** per slot.

Stack limits depend on the item rarity/category:
• Common stacks bigger than Legendary
• Minerals stack larger than normal items
• Lootboxes have their own limits

Example:
If Common stack limit is **20**, one slot can hold **20 Common** items.

fields.name: So what does “Inventory Full” mean?
fields.value:
It means you ran out of **free slots**, not that you hit some random total item limit.

Even if you have only 1 item type, if it needs multiple stacks:
`slots used = ceil(quantity / stack_limit)`

So if you're carrying 41 Common items and your stack limit is 20:
`ceil(41/20) = 3 slots used`

fields.name: The Smart Upgrade Strategy
fields.value:
• Upgrade **Inventory** if you own many different items.
• Upgrade **Pockets** if one item keeps overflowing into multiple stacks.

pages.title: ⬆️ Upgrading Storage (Inventory + Pockets)
pages.description:
Both **Inventory** and **Pockets** can be upgraded.

Upgrades follow Veyra’s "confirmation before buying" style.
So the bot won’t steal your gold instantly (rare W).

fields.name: How upgrades work
fields.value:
Upgrades are like buildings:
• Veyra shows description + cost
• you must type `yes` to confirm
• if you don’t confirm in time → cancelled

fields.name: Why upgrade?
fields.value:
More capacity =
• accept more items
• hold more loot
• trade more
• stop crying about "inventory full"
